summary: Iteration 26: Post-refactor smoke tests COMPLETE. Backend: 6/6 tests PASSED. Frontend: All pages load correctly without runtime crashes.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code-splitting using exec() with part files works correctly - all routes load and respond
Frontend ChatPage.js imports from ChatPageSections.jsx work correctly
Frontend AimmhHubPage.jsx imports from AimmhHubTabContent.jsx work correctly
All hub tabs render without blank screen or runtime crash
Pricing page loads with all package cards and donation section visible

test_credentials.note: Fresh users registered for each test session via /api/auth/register with username field

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified that the large code-splitting refactor did not break functionality. Backend uses exec() with .part01.txt/.part02.txt files for v1_hub.py and auth.py - this pattern works correctly. Frontend components split into ChatPageSections.jsx and AimmhHubTabContent.jsx load without issues. Auth uses 'username' field (not email) for registration.

details.test_hub_options_with_auth: PASS - Returns 200 with patterns and supports

details.chat_page_load: PASS - /chat loads splash screen with 'Enter AIMMH' button
details.hub_page_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs render (Claude.md, Registry, Instances, Rooms & Runs, Response Synthesis, Chat+Synth)
details.hub_page_buttons: PASS - Pricing, Logout, Guide chat buttons all present
details.pricing_free_tier: PASS - Free tier card shows 'Max 3 active agents', 'Max 3 saved personas', 'Max 1 connected BYOK key'

features_verified: Backend: /api/ready returns 200 with status=ready and mongo check
Backend: /api/v1/hub/options returns 401 for unauthenticated, 200 for authenticated
Backend: /api/v1/hub/instances returns 401 for unauthenticated, 200 for authenticated
Frontend: /chat loads without blank screen or runtime crash
Frontend: AIMMH Hub tabs all render correctly
Frontend: /pricing loads with package cards and donation section

mocked_apis.details: Stripe test-mode behavior exists (not in scope for this smoke run)
